{{CargoOrgan
|name=Intuition Migrasome Organ
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10852
|idx=57
|description=The organism begins manipulating its own magnetic field, turning it into an extension of its senses—granting early warning of danger and lightning-fast reflexes.
|skill=
|hp=1294
|def=141
|atk=237
|rush=124
|gene1=In Gene Sims, CRIT DMG +10%
|gene2=Gene Simulation Power Checks -4%
|gene3=In Gene Sims, Round 1 DMG +10%
|gene4=Water DMG +60
|gene7=Water DMG +3% (Awakened)
|}}
